ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphics_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graphics card model */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the graphics card model */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the graphics card (e.g., GeForce RTX 20xx) */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Memory of the graphics card in GB */,
  "gpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of GPU cores */,
  "clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the graphics card in GHz */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the graphics card */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the graphics card */,
  "power_consumption" INTEGER /* Power consumption of the graphics card in watts */,
  "cooling_technology" TEXT /* Cooling technology used (e.g., air, liquid) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Indicates whether the card is currently available in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ebay_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card model */,
  "avg_price" TEXT /* Average eBay price for the graphics card model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the price was last updated */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., eBay, Amazon) */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., average, lowest, highest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ebay_prices_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card model */,
  "qty_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "gross_sales" TEXT /* Gross sales */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the sale */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, retail) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card model */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second (FPS) */,
  "fps_dollar" REAL /* FPS per dollar */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution at which the performance metrics were measured */,
  "test_bench" TEXT /* Test bench used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the series */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the series */,
  "target_market" TEXT /* Target market (e.g., gamers, professionals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card model */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "qty_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "gross_sales" TEXT /* Gross sales */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the sale */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, retail) */,
  "forecast_qty" INTEGER /* Forecasted quantity of sales */,
  "forecast_sales" TEXT /* Forecasted gross sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)
